name: Digital Asset Acquisition Corp.
business: Digital Asset Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company formed to enter into a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. It has neither engaged in any operations nor generated any revenue to date. The company is a shell company with no operations and nominal assets consisting almost entirely of cash.

exposures.sentence: We may pursue an initial Business Combination in any business or industry but expect to focus on targets in the digital asset and cryptocurrency sectors.
